catalogue.name: Forces of the Federal Coalition Navy

rules.name: Boarding Clamps
rules.description: A unit equipped with Boarding Clamps can make a Melee Attack against a target ship. If the attack is successful, the target ship is considered boarded. This action does not deal damage to the target but counts as one of the unit's actions for the turn.

selectionEntries.name: Federal Coalition Naval Forces Command Cards

rules.name: •Full Speed Ahead (Mobile Bay)
rules.description: Play this card to add +3 MOVE to the MOBILE BAY's movement. Discard the card after use.

rules.name: •Overwhelming Volley (Mobile Bay)
rules.description: If the MOBILE BAY uses its Rate of Fire against an enemy ship, add +2 Nerve tokens to the total when determining how many Nerve tokens are placed on the enemy ship.

rules.name: •Donat's Gambit (Poltava)
rules.description: Select POLTAVA. That unit immediately makes a bonus CMBT action but gains +2 NERVE tokens.

rules.name: •Defensive Formation (Poltava)
rules.description:
Select the POLTAVA. Until the end of the turn POLTAVA cannot advance
Enemy units attacking must target POLTAVA first if able. Damage dealt to POLTAVA is reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 1)

rules.name: • Priority Target (Port Arthur)
rules.description: PORT ARTHUR increases its DMG for its BEAM weapons to DMG 12 for this turn but gains +2 stress until the start of the next turn.

rules.name: • Carrier Screen (Port Arthur)
rules.description: Select up a nearby HEAVY SUPPORT unit in CMD range. Until the end of the turn PORT ARTHUR may intercept attacks targeting a selected capital ship.

rules.name: •Unity of Purpose
rules.description: Select a ship or squadron within the Voice of Command range of your Task Force Commander. The chosen unit may reroll any failed Leadership or Nerve checks during this turn. Discard this card after it is used.

rules.name: •Orbital Dominance
rules.description: During your activation, select one LIGHT SUPPORT or HEAVY SUPPORT ship. If that ship remains on a planetary objective at the end of the round, you gain +2 Victory Points. Play this card at the start of the unit's activation, and discard it at the end of the round.

rules.name: •• Ironclad Resolve (Mobile Bay)
rules.description: Play this card when MOBILE BAY is targeted by an attack. Reduce the total DMG by 3 for this attack. Discard this card after use.

rules.name: •• Chaff Deployment (Mobile Bay)
rules.description: If MOBILE BAY is targeted by an attack, you may play this card to deploy Chaff as an action. Place a Chaff token next to MOBILE BAY. While the Chaff token is in play, any MISSILE weapon attack targeting MOBILE BAY loses 1 die from its attack pool. The Chaff token remains active until the end of the round when it is removed from the board. Discard this card after use.

rules.name: •• Defensive Perimeter (Poltava)
rules.description: Until the end of the round Friendly LIGHT CORE and HEAVY CORE units within CMD range may redirect attacks aimed at POLTAVA to them instead.

rules.name: •• Scorched Sky Protocol (Poltava)
rules.description: Select an area of the battlefield within CMD range of POLTAVA. Until the end of the next turn any unit entering or ending movement in that area takes a DMG 12, Piercing 1 attack against it.

rules.name: •• Overloaded Batteries (Port Arthur)
rules.description: The next time Port Arthur deals damage this turn, that damage is treated as a CRITICAL HIT.

rules.name: •• Damage Control Teams  (Port Arthur)
rules.description: Select PORT ARTHUR. Immediately remove 2 DMG tokens from PORTH ARTHURs card. PORT ARTHUR cannot attack this turn.

rules.name: ••Hold the Line
rules.description: When an enemy unit attacks a LIGHT CORE or HEAVY CORE ship, add +1 DEF to your defense dice pool.

rules.name: ••Logistical Superiority
rules.description: At the start of the Activation Phase, restore 1 health box to each of up to two friendly LIGHT CORE units within the Voice of Command range of your Task Force Commander.

rules.name: ••• Decisive Coordination  (Mobile Bay)
rules.description: Select one LIGHT SUPPORT or HEAVY CORE unit within the Voice of Command range of MOBILE BAY. This unit gains an additional activation this turn. Discard this card after use.

rules.name: ••• Last Salvo (Poltava)
rules.description: When POLTAVA is destroyed it immediately makes one final CMBT attack before removal. All enemy units within POLTAVA's CMD range +2 NERVE as a result of the Salvo.

rules.name: ••• Command Assumed (Port Arthur)
rules.description: Play immediately when your FLAGSHIP is destroyed. Select PORT ARTHUR to become the Task Force FLAGSHIP. That unit may immediately activate (even if it has already been activated this turn)

rules.name: ••• Coordinated Assault
rules.description: Select two LIGHT SUPPORT or LIGHT CORE units that are within each other's Voice of Command range. If both units target the same enemy unit this turn, add +3 to their combined DMG total. Discard this card after use.

rules.name: Boarding Clamps
rules.description: A unit equipped with Boarding Clamps can make a Melee Attack against a target ship. If the attack is successful, the target ship is considered boarded. This action does not deal damage to the target but counts as one of the unit's actions for the turn.
